task_completion.description: Create a new Activity Plan named 'Standard Outreach'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Activity Plans configuration screen or form view shows a plan with the name 'Standard Outreach'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Email activity step in the plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'Standard Outreach' plan details, there is a step with Activity Type 'Email', Summary 'Intro Packet', and a schedule/delay of 0 days.

task_completion.description: Configure the Call activity step in the plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'Standard Outreach' plan details, there is a step with Activity Type 'Call', Summary 'Follow-up Call', and a schedule/delay of 2 days.
The CRM pipeline or form view shows the opportunity named 'Acme Corp Inquiry' opened on the screen.

task_completion.description: Apply the Activity Plan to the opportunity
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chatter or activity section of the 'Acme Corp Inquiry' opportunity shows the newly scheduled activities ('Intro Packet' email and 'Follow-up Call' call), or there is a confirmation dialog showing the 'Standard Outreach' plan being applied.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web GUI to complete the task

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the existing opportunity

integrity.description: Agent did not use text editors to fake the output
